steps.clue: Build the Aetherscope after restoring Pack-a-Punch.
Give Vogel's diary to the three spectral reflections.
Unlock the terminal and fire all four D.I.E. variants at the chamber.
Use the Dark Aether Wrench to fire the tank and recover the missing agent.
Trap both halves of a split Megaton in the chamber.
Collect Orlov's family photo and return to the cyclotron.
Protect Orlov while he shuts down the three systems, then escape.
